mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates tightening labor markets, boosting consumer spending and corporate profits, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If 5-day forward returns are negative in 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production (INDPRO) and decrease in inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals strong supply-side growth without price pressures, creating a favorable environment for equity returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If 60-day forward returns are negative when INDPRO rises >1.5% and CPIAUCSL falls >0.3% in the same month.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly rebound in GDP (GDPC1) following a contraction signals recovery in aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If 60-day forward returns are negative in 50% of instances where GDPC1 shows a quarterly rebound.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in the federal funds rate above 4.5% indicates tightening monetary policy, which raises borrowing costs and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If 20-day forward returns are positive in 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 150k signals robust labor market conditions, boosting corporate revenue and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If 5-day forward returns are negative in 50% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in housing starts (HOUST) and real sales (RSAFS) indicates rising consumer demand, creating tailwinds for equity markets and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If 20-day forward returns are negative when HOUST and RSAFS both rise >2% in the same month.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 signals weakening supply-side activity, leading to lower corporate earnings and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If 60-day forward returns are positive in 50% of instances where INDPRO falls below 100.
